Purpose: Define controlled payment/card use, cardholder responsibilities, receipt rules, monthly review, and revocation.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What card/payment method should KBC use and who may hold cards?. File name: docs/policies/offering-counting-and-deposit-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define controls for counting, recording, and depositing offerings.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What current counting process is used and what controls are required?. File name: docs/policies/monthly-financial-review-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define monthly review items for reports, reconciliations, budget status, and exceptions.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What exact monthly packet should be required?. File name: docs/policies/audit-and-review-policy.md. Type of document: Policy. Purpose: Define periodic audit, review, or external accounting expectations.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Congregation if vote required. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What level of review is appropriate for KBC and who performs it?. File name: docs/procedures/weekly-bookkeeping-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide repeatable weekly bookkeeping steps.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Bookkeeper, Treasurer, Finance Committee. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What exact weekly tasks are performed today?. File name: docs/procedures/monthly-close-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide repeatable month-end close steps and report preparation.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Bookkeeper, Treasurer, Finance Committee. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What system reports and reconciliations are required each month?. File name: docs/procedures/monthly-finance-committee-meeting-checklist.md. Type of document: Procedure / checklist. Purpose: Provide recurring monthly Finance Committee meeting checklist for income/expenses, budget, designated funds, cards, reimbursements, exceptions, votes, and business meeting reporting.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Who prepares the packet, records decisions, and maintains the checklist?. File name: docs/procedures/payroll-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Document payroll inputs, approval flow, provider/software steps, and records.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Who owns payroll changes, approvals, and professional review?. File name: docs/procedures/contribution-entry-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Document contribution entry, total matching, discrepancies, confidentiality, and reporting.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Who enters contributions today, and how is donor confidentiality protected?. File name: docs/procedures/reimbursement-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Document reimbursement request, approval, payment, and filing steps.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Bookkeeper, Treasurer. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: Which form or software workflow will be used?. File name: docs/procedures/business-meeting-report-process.md. Type of document: Procedure. Purpose: Define preparation and communication of financial reports for church business meetings.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Pastor, Congregation. Operations Manual: Yes. Open questions: What report format does the congregation expect or require?. File name: docs/software-evaluation/software-requirements.md. Type of document: Requirements. Purpose: Define software requirements before selecting ChurchTrac, IconCMO, QuickBooks, or another system.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Bookkeeper. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Which requirements are must-have before demos?.
